content:
# Session 15 (iter-015) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- **Iter / session:** iter-015 = session_15. Model: opus (prover lane), sonnet (lean-auditor), opus (lvb-checker).
- **Lane:** single fine-grained pass on `AlgebraicJacobian/RiemannRoch/OcOfD.lean` ‚Äî DECOMPOSE the deep S3
  cokernel-‚âÖ-skyscraper iso (3 prior blind attempts regressed sorry 0‚Üí2‚Üí4; STUCK sub-signal).
- **OcOfD sorry (decl-level):** the single opaque deep `sorry` (`cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper`)
  + 2 `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners ‚Üí **iso body now `sorry`-FREE** + **5 new faithfully-typed stubs** at
  pinned `\lean{}` names + 2 corners unchanged. Bare `sorry` bodies in file: 8 (L771 out-of-cone singlePoint,
  L1144/1163/1180/1197/1296 the 5 stubs, L1437/1443 corners). File **compiles** (no errors).
- **Build:** green via LSP diagnostics (0 errors; only `open scoped Classical` + `Sheaf.val` deprecation warnings).

## Targets & attempts

### SOLVED ‚Äî `sheafOf.orderAtPSubmodule` (axiom-clean, NEW, L1040)
- The `Submodule kbar K(C)` cut out by `g = 0 ‚à® -(D P) ‚â§ ord_P g` ‚Äî the fractional ideal `œÄ_P^{-n}¬∑ùí™_{C,P}`
  via the DVR valuation (no explicit uniformiser). Closure proofs (zero/add/smul) adapted from
  `carrierSubmodule` specialised to the single prime `P`: `Ring.ordFrac_add`,
  `Ring.ordFrac_ge_one_of_ne_zero`, germ-to-stalk (`germ_stalkSpecializes_apply`, `Algebra.smul_def`) for
  the scalar case. **`lean_verify` ‚Üí `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (no `sorryAx`).**
- This is the *codomain* of the stubbed `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`: proving the target object even while the
  iso landing in it stays a stub banks reusable, concrete infra.

### SOLVED ‚Äî `sheafOf.cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` (body `sorry`-free, L1268)
- Was a bare `sorry` def. Retargeted to:
  ```
  haveI := sheafOf.cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso (C := C) D P
  asIso (sheafOf.cokernel_skyscraper_hom (C := C) D P)
  ```
- `lean_verify` ‚Üí `{propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` ‚Äî `sorryAx` ONLY via the transitive
  S-C/S-D stubs; the assembly itself contains no `sorry`. lean-auditor explicitly confirmed the `asIso`
  chain is **sound and NOT circular** (it delegates the `sorry` into the named leaves).
- **Headline of the pass:** the one opaque deep iso is converted into a structured chain with the deep
  work isolated in named leaves. Downstream `carrierSheaf_ses_single_add` still typechecks against it.

### PARTIAL ‚Äî 5 typed stubs at pinned `\lean{}` names (plan-sanctioned deferrals)
- `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (L1139, `lem:carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_fractionalIdeal`) ‚Äî **the binding leaf**,
  `stalk (carrierSheaf D) P.point ‚âÖ ModuleCat.of kbar (orderAtPSubmodule D P)`. ~200‚Äì400 LOC
  (filtered-colimit-of-submodules ‚Üí union inside `K(C)` ‚Üí smooth-curve constraint collapse to `P`); NO
  Mathlib carrier-stalk API. Explicitly scoped OUT this pass per PROGRESS (4th-regression avoidance).
- `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1156) ‚Äî `stalk (cokernel f) P.point ‚âÖ kÃÑ`; mult-by-`œÄ^{n+1}` + residue.
- `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` (L1173) ‚Äî the residue-evaluation morphism `coker f ‚ü∂ skyscraper`.
- `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` (L1193) ‚Äî `IsIso` of the above; un-attemptable while S-C is a stub
  (`isIso_of_stalkFunctor_map_iso` must evaluate the morphism's stalk maps). G1 input
  (`carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem`, away-from-P) already PROVEN.
- `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` (L1293) ‚Äî `carrierSheaf 0 ‚âÖ toModuleKSheaf C` corner bridge
  (Hartshorne II.6.3A, `A = ‚ãÇ_{ht ùî≠=1} A_ùî≠`); no single-call Mathlib form.

### PARTIAL ‚Äî `sheafOf_ses_single_add` 2 corners (L1437/1443) unchanged
- Main case (`D‚âÝ0 ‚àß [P]+D‚âÝ0`) already proven (delegates to `carrierSheaf_ses_single_add`). Corners
  deferred deliberately: wiring them now is net-neutral on deep-sorry count (still gated on the stubbed
  bridge) at regression risk. Exact `ShortComplex.shortExact_of_iso` transport recipe recorded inline.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Decomposition pattern (KB):** dissolve a stuck deep iso into `haveI := <isIso-stub>; asIso <hom-stub>` ‚Äî
  iso body goes `sorry`-free immediately, deep work relocates into 2 named leaves, provably non-circular.
- **Prove the target object early:** `orderAtPSubmodule` axiom-clean while its stalk-iso stays a stub.
- The decomposition is faithful, not laundering ‚Äî both review subagents 0 must-fix; every stub honestly typed.

## Subagent reports (full content NOT duplicated here)
- **lean-auditor/iter015** (`logs/iter-015/lean-auditor-iter015-report.md`): **0 must-fix, 6 major / 7 minor.**
  Majors 1‚Äì4 = stale docstrings/header (module header names 2 sorries vs actual 7; `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero`
  docstrings still say "Tier-3 honest typed sorry" though fully implemented). Major 5 = `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val`
  **deprecated** in the types of `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (L1142) + `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1161) ‚Äî will
  ERROR when bodies are filled. Major 6 = `asIso` assembly confirmed sound/non-circular. No laundering, no
  excuse-comments. Comment-only `.lean` cleanup ‚Üí next OcOfD prover (review cannot edit `.lean`).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd** (`logs/iter-015/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-ocofd-report.md`): faithful,
  **0 must-fix**, 1 major / 1 minor. Major = `orderAtPSubmodule` coverage debt (no `\lean{}` block; confirmed
  via `archon dag-query unmatched`). Minor = label `lem:cokernel_sheofOf_‚Ä¶` (RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex L1647)
  misspelled ("sheofOf") and never `\cref`'d; its `\lean{}` pin is correct. All 7 directive pins resolve to
  correctly-typed decls; chapter adequate but light on the colimit-of-submodules mechanical step for the
  binding stalk leaf.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` iter=15 added 5 statement-level `\leanok` (the 5 newly-existing stubs) ‚Äî correct (typed
  `sorry` decls, statement formalized). The iso's proof block correctly got NO `\leanok` (transitively
  `sorryAx`). No `\mathlibok` warranted (no new Mathlib re-exports). No `\lean{}` rename (all pins correct).
  The `sheofOf` label typo is prose-structural (never `\cref`'d) ‚Üí left for the planner/writer, not a marker fix.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Lead with a `prove`/`mathlib-build` lane on `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (binding leaf;
closing it cascades S-B‚ÜíS-C‚ÜíS-D and the iso lands automatically), migrating `Sheaf.val ‚Üí ObjectProperty.obj`
in the stub types first. Blueprint `orderAtPSubmodule` (coverage debt). Hand a comment-only OcOfD cleanup.
